issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for Lighthouse CI failures.
Only one code block example is provided, lacking the required 2+ realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: Add Lighthouse CI to GitHub Actions blocking PRs on Core Web Vitals regressions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment ships lighthouserc.js with numberOfRuns 3, assert.assertions for largest-contentful-paint/cumulative-layout-shift/total-blocking-time as error with maxNumericValue thresholds, and a GitHub Actions workflow using treosh/lighthouse-ci-action@v11 with configPath; baseline produces a script-based run that does not set numeric budgets per metric.

scenarios.name: Set resource budgets to block bundle growth and third-party script creep
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes a budget.json with path /*, resourceSizes for script and total, and resourceCounts third-party 5, then wires it into the lighthouserc.js assertions; baseline mentions budgets generically without the resourceCounts/resourceSizes shape.
